---
title: "Pt-HotpotQA: Evaluating Multi-Hop Question Answering on the Original and Translated Portuguese Datasets Using LLMs"
date: 2025-01-01
author: ["Sérgio Silva Mucciaccia","Thiago Meireles Paixão","Filipe Mutz","Alberto Ferreira de Souza","Claudine Santos Badue","Thiago Oliveira dos Santos"]
publication: "Journal of the Brazilian Computer Society"
categories: []
url_source: "https://journals-sol.sbc.org.br/index.php/jbcs/article/view/5801"
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of the Brazilian Computer Society"
year: 2025
---

[Check out the paper!](https://journals-sol.sbc.org.br/index.php/jbcs/article/view/5801)
